name: Claims backend errors on file — agent recovers without fabricating
notes: Robustness path: verify_policy is active, but cap_file_claim raises (system_error mock). claim_id never binds, so the agent must NOT invent a claim id; it should apologize, say the claim wasn't filed, and offer a human. Demonstrates the error-behavior mock kind + instruction-guided recovery in flow_schedule_adjuster. capability_assertions confirm the agent actually attempted cap_file_claim (so the error path is what's exercised) and escalated via cap_transfer_to_human.
user_turns: Pat Lin, policy three oh nine eight eight one two.
Got rear-ended on the highway an hour ago, the other driver stopped. No police.
Just my car — back bumper, still drivable. The other driver was Sam Avery.
Yes, please get me a person.
